description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a vibrant and colorful exterior, dominated by shades of blue, red, and purple, with a glossy finish. The front panel includes a large display screen, a control panel with buttons, and a coin slot below, all framed by bold, stylized artwork. The marquee at the top displays the game title 'Street Skate Superstars' in a dynamic font, surrounded by energetic, icy graphics. Both side panels are adorned with a cartoonish character in a red outfit riding a skateboard, reinforcing the skateboarding theme. The back of the cabinet is plain black with ventilation grilles and a blue patterned top surface. The overall structure is tall and rectangular, with a slightly angled marquee and control panel for ergonomic gameplay.
description: A tall, colorful arcade game cabinet with bold 'Street Skate Superstars' artwork, a large screen, control panel, and coin slot, featuring vibrant skateboarding-themed graphics on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with buttons, coin slot, and the marquee with the game title.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large, cartoonish skateboarding character and the 'Street Skate Superstars' logo on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with ventilation grilles and a blue patterned top surface.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring the same skateboarding character and logo artwork.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, large and slightly curved with a visible bezel around the display area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two round buttons, arranged in a simple horizontal row, with a red and blue color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Street Skate Superstars' title in bold, white and red letters with icy blue background graphics and a dynamic, energetic theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display a large cartoon character in a red outfit riding a skateboard, with the game title and icy blue background, creating a vibrant and playful skateboarding theme.
